signal-yellow.$description: Signal Yellow — Full-bleed page and section background — the unbroken sunny sky that fills every viewport and frames all illustration. The yellow IS the canvas, not a surface sitting on a white page

globe-azure.$description: Globe Azure — Hero focal surface — the spherical focal element rising from the bottom of the viewport, and any large circular/oval composition element. White text sits directly on this blue

roof-coral.$description: Roof Coral — Illustrated house roofs and accent fills within the hand-drawn scenes — decorative, never used on UI chrome

charcoal-ink.$description: Charcoal Ink — All body text, nav link text, nav link borders, and the thin linework inside the illustrations. The single dark value the entire UI runs on

cloud-white.$description: Cloud White — Display text overlaid on the blue globe, scattered cloud illustrations across the yellow sky, and window fills inside the house artwork. The only light value used structurally

changa-one.$description: Sole display and headline face. Carries every word that needs personality — the curving hero line, the self-intro statement, section openers. Single weight (400) but the chunky rounded letterforms do all the heavy lifting; no bold/light variants exist in the system.

arial.$description: Nav links only — the five top-of-page items (HOME, ABOUT, WORK, PLAY, CONTACT). The system-font choice deliberately plays utilitarian against the custom display face; the nav reads as a neutral signpost, not as part of the illustration.

sunny-sky.$description: Surface level 0: Full-bleed page canvas — every section starts here.

globe-sphere.$description: Surface level 1: Circular focal surface (1440px radius) rising from the bottom of the hero, holding the display headline.
